title: Putin congratulates Trump on election win, says he’s ‘ready’ for talks
description:
Russian President Vladimir Putin congratulated President-elect Donald Trump on his election win and said his desire to facilitate an end to the crisis in Ukraine “deserves attention.” Putin’s comments were made during the 21st annual meeting of the Valdai Discussion Club in Sochi, Russia.
